response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff-level engineer with 20+ years of experience applying for an entry-level Junior Java role — a severe seniority mismatch that creates high attrition risk and salary expectation gaps. While technical breadth is strong, Java is listed only as a peripheral skill with no recent demonstrated depth, and German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the strong German requirement for client-facing insurance consulting work. The profile does not match the target hire.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background including some Java exposure
Demonstrated agile, TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship practice
Strong track record of client collaboration and architecture work
concerns: Massive overqualification for an entry-level junior position
German is only basic, below the strong German requirement
Java is not a primary stack; recent work is TS/Node/DLang focused
